name: Motor and Generator Manufacturing
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. Cold-drawn near-net-shape dovetail/T-slot keybar profiles for large generator stator assemblies. 0 knockout constraints — keybar cross-section is constant 2D, well within cold-draw capacity and alloy range. Key OEM buyers: GE Vernova, Siemens Energy, ABB, Hitachi Energy.
entryStrategy: Existing market — expand from turbo-generator OEMs into hydro-generator and industrial motor segments via die library leverage and 42CrMo4 fatigue data provision.
